---
title: "Weather_over_time"
author: "Marcus Luca"
date: "2026-04-14"
output: html_document
---


```{r warning=FALSE}
library(MarcusFlagWeather)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
data("Flagstaff_Weather")
```

Graph #1 (Snow VS Date)

```{r}
ggplot(Flagstaff_Weather,
       aes( x = DATE,
            y = SNOW)) +
  geom_point()
```

Graph #2 (Precipitation vs DATE)


```{r}
ggplot(Flagstaff_Weather,
       aes( x = DATE ,
            y = PRCP)) +
  geom_point()
```



Graph #3 (Max teperature VS Date)
```{r}
ggplot(slice_sample(Flagstaff_Weather,n = 1000),
       aes( x = DATE ,
            y = TMAX)) +
  geom_point()
```
